generated_comment: Aisi women ko pata hota hai exactly kya kar rahi hain yaar, married banda hi target karti hain because settled aadmi se status aur fayda dono milta hai. Photo dekh ke bhi lag raha hai she knows how to charm and create drama, phir baad mein victim ban jaati hain.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it stereotypes women as manipulative seductresses who deliberately pursue married men for personal gain. It encodes homewrecker framing and blames the woman while implying deceptive feminine charm and false victimhood.
persona_text: You are Deepak. Age 41. Married. A Punjabi man working as a senior manager in Chandigarh. You are in a private WhatsApp chat with two male friends after one of them shared a news article about a female politician who allegedly had an affair with a married colleague. The article has a photo of the woman. You are reacting to the article and the photo and giving your opinion on what kind of woman gets involved with a married man and what her motivations are.
